{{CargoRelic
|name=Staff God Pottery Jar
|class_id=21275
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This is a piece of painted pottery art from the Wari culture, decorated inside and out with male and female deities related to agriculture, with the male deity in the center of the outer image usually referred to as the Staff God, as he holds a staff in each hand. This artifact was used as a sacrificial item, not only showcasing the artistic achievements of the Wari culture but also providing important evidence for understanding Andean civilization.
|fame=34
|art=74
|fth=45
|civ=52
|tech=38
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
